title: Frisket Preflight Profile
description: Declarative preflight profile (YAML or JSON). Profiles are data, not code — the Qt plugin stays engine-agnostic.

schema_version.description: Profile contract version. Bump only with a coordinated engine + plugin release.

name.description: Human-readable profile name (also referenced by report.profile).

description.description: Optional summary of when to use this profile.

job_types.description: Frisket job categories this profile applies to.

checks.description: Ordered list of checks to run. Unknown ids are ignored or reported by the engine (implementation-defined).

fixups.description: Optional fixups advertised for this profile. Fixups are opt-in; never auto-applied.

severity.description: Finding severity when the check fails. Defaults to error if omitted.

enabled.description: When false, skip this check without removing it from the profile.

amount_pt.description: Bleed or similar length in PDF points (1 pt = 1/72 in). 9 pt ≈ 0.125 in.

required.description: Whether the checked feature must be present (e.g. bleed).

expected_width_pt.description: Expected trim/page width in points (page-size / trim).

expected_height_pt.description: Expected trim/page height in points (page-size / trim).

confirm.description: When true (default), UI must confirm before applying. Destructive fixups must set confirm: true.
